headline: Dollar Tree (DLTR) Plans 75 Store Closures And 400 Openings In 2026
summary: Dollar Tree, NasdaqGS:DLTR, plans to close 75 stores and open 400 new locations in 2026. The move reflects a reshaping of the company’s store footprint with net expansion despite closures. The planned changes highlight evolving priorities around store economics, traffic patterns, and customer demand. Dollar Tree operates in the discount retail sector, where price sensitive shoppers often look for low ticket essentials and household items. The planned closures and openings in 2026 indicate...
